SpiritedWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMysterySymbolsFeature1: During any spin, if there are 1 or more Mystery symbol(s) on the reels and there is no more winning combination, all Mystery symbol(s) will reveal a randomly selected symbol (excluding Wild symbol, Scatter symbol and Mystery symbol) before wins are paid.
SpiritedWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMultiplierFeature1: During any spin, all wins will be multiplied by the multiplier shown above the reels, starting with x1 in the first round.
SpiritedWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMultiplierFeature2: Any win in the first round will increase the second round's multiplier to x2.
SpiritedWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMultiplierFeature3: Any win in the second round will increase the third round's multiplier to x3.
SpiritedWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMultiplierFeature4: Any win in the third round will increase the fourth round's (and beyond) multiplier to x5.
SpiritedWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
SpiritedWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature2: During the Free Spins Feature, the multipliers above the reels will be increased to x3, x6, x9 and x15 respectively.
SpiritedWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue1: Some symbols (excluding Wild symbol, Scatter symbol and Mystery symbol) may occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
SpiritedWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol and Mystery symbol.
SpiritedWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue3: Wild symbols appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.
SpiritedWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
SpiritedWondersPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.

SpiritedWondersRules.GeneralRules1: Spirited Wonders is a 6-reel, 4-row (with an additional row for each of reel 2, 3, 4 and 5) video slot featuring Mystery symbols and win multiplier.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for 256 ways - %{10000} ways, bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

SpiritedWondersRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
